fields.summary: User Login with Email and Password (Simplified)
fields.description:
As a user, I want to log in with my email and password so that I can access my dashboard.

Note: OAuth login and Remember Me features have been descoped from this release.
fields.customfield_10014:
Given a registered user
When they enter valid credentials
Then they should be redirected to dashboard

Given an unregistered email
When they attempt login
Then they should see an error message

items.fromString: Original description with OAuth and Remember Me
items.toString: Simplified description — OAuth and Remember Me descoped
